test_name: Happy path — RM creates customer link for own lead
preconditions: RM user authenticated with valid JWT
Lead owned by this RM exists with lead_id = '11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111'
No existing active customer_links row for this lead
expected_result: HTTP 201; response envelope { data: { customer_link_id: <UUID>, status: 'active', expires_at: <ISO8601 7 days from now> }, meta: {}, error: null }; raw token absent from response body; customer_links row with status='active' and token_hash set (non-null, non-empty); audit_logs row with action='link_create' and lead_id='11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111'; event_outbox row with event_code='DOC_REQUEST'
postconditions: Exactly one active customer_links row for this lead
audit_logs has one link_create entry
event_outbox has one DOC_REQUEST entry

test_name: Resend — second create revokes first link and issues new token
preconditions: Active customer_links row already exists for lead with customer_link_id = 'aaaaaaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaaaaaaaaaa'
test_steps: POST /api/v1/leads/11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111/customer-link with same body as TC-FR060-01
expected_result: HTTP 201; old link customer_link_id='aaaaaaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaaaaaaaaaa' has status='revoked' and revoked_by=<rm_user_id>; new link has status='active'; SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer_links WHERE lead_id='11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111' AND status='active' returns 1 (no duplicates)
postconditions: Only one active link per lead
Revoked link has revoked_by set to acting RM user_id

test_name: FORBIDDEN — RM cannot create link for lead they do not own
expected_result: HTTP 403; { data: null, meta: {}, error: { code: 'FORBIDDEN', message: '...', retryable: false } }; no customer_links row inserted
postconditions: No new customer_links row for this lead

test_name: Expired token — GET /c/{token} returns NOT_FOUND and marks link expired
preconditions: customer_links row exists with expires_at = NOW() - INTERVAL '1 second', status='active'
expected_result: HTTP 404; { error: { code: 'NOT_FOUND' } }; customer_links.status updated to 'expired' in DB; SELECT status FROM customer_links WHERE token_hash = sha256('expiredtoken12345678901234567890ab') returns 'expired'
postconditions: Link status is 'expired' in DB
No sensitive lead data returned

test_name: OTP rate limit — 11th attempt returns RATE_LIMITED
preconditions: Valid active link with raw token = 'validtoken9876543210abcdefabcdef'
Redis OTP key set with value '654321'
10 wrong OTP attempts already recorded in Redis rate-limit counter
expected_result: HTTP 429; { error: { code: 'RATE_LIMITED', retryable: true } }; Retry-After header present with value > 0; Redis rate-limit key still set
postconditions: Retry-After header present
OTP session not created in Redis

test_name: OTP happy path — correct OTP sets session in Redis
preconditions: Valid active link with raw token = 'validtoken9876543210abcdefabcdef'
expected_result: HTTP 200; { data: { otp_verified: true }, error: null }; Redis key 'clsession:<customer_link_id>' exists with TTL > 0; Redis OTP key deleted; customer_links.otp_verified_at IS NOT NULL in DB
postconditions: Redis clsession key set
OTP key removed from Redis
otp_verified_at timestamp set in DB

test_name: Upload without OTP step-up — AUTH_REQUIRED
preconditions: No Redis clsession key (OTP not verified)
expected_result: HTTP 401; { error: { code: 'AUTH_REQUIRED' } }; no documents row inserted; no GCS write
postconditions: No new document row in DB
GCS staging bucket unchanged

test_name: File exceeds 10 MB limit — PAYLOAD_TOO_LARGE
preconditions: Active OTP-verified link with raw token = 'validtoken9876543210abcdefabcdef'
expected_result: HTTP 413; { error: { code: 'PAYLOAD_TOO_LARGE', retryable: false } }; no documents row inserted; no GCS signed URL returned
postconditions: No document row created in DB

test_name: Infected file — virus scan rejects document post-upload
preconditions: Document row exists with document_id='dddddddd-dddd-dddd-dddd-dddddddddddd', status='uploaded', virus_scan_status='pending', storage_ref='gs://staging/pan-v1.pdf'
expected_result: documents.virus_scan_status='infected'; documents.deleted_at IS NOT NULL; documents.storage_ref IS NULL; GCS deleteObject called once; audit_logs row written; event_outbox row with infected payload; document NOT accessible via any read endpoint
postconditions: SELECT document_id FROM documents WHERE virus_scan_status='infected' AND deleted_at IS NULL returns 0 rows
SELECT document_id FROM documents WHERE virus_scan_status='infected' AND storage_ref IS NOT NULL returns 0 rows

test_name: Masking — GET /c/{token} response hides internal fields
preconditions: Lead has owner_id='owneruuid', los_application_id='LOS-9999', score=78, lead_code='LD-2026-00042'
expected_result: HTTP 200; response body JSON stringified does NOT contain any of: 'owner_id', 'lead_code', 'score', 'los_application_id', 'score_reasons'; data.lead_display contains only product_display_name and status_label fields
postconditions: No internal fields leaked in response

test_name: Disallowed MIME type — executable upload rejected
expected_result: HTTP 415; { error: { code: 'UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA', retryable: false } }; no GCS write; no documents row inserted
postconditions: No document row in DB for this upload attempt

test_steps: Execute invariant query after every link create operation

preconditions: Only this one exception for the lead
KYC user JWT with branch scope matching lead
test_steps: Body: { "resolutionCode": "re_verified", "remarks": "PAN re-checked and verified with applicant physically" }

test_data.remarks: PAN re-checked and verified with applicant physically

expected_result: HTTP 200; data.status='resolved'; data.resolutionCode='re_verified'; data.error=null; DB: kyc_verifications.status='resolved'; event_outbox row with event_code='KYC_EXCEPTION' and aggregate_id='kycv-uuid-0002'; leads.kyc_status='verified' (no remaining open exceptions); audit_logs row with action='kyc_exception' and entity_id='kycv-uuid-0002'
postconditions: SELECT kyc_status FROM leads WHERE lead_id='55555555-5555-5555-5555-555555555555' returns 'verified'
SELECT status FROM kyc_verifications WHERE kyc_verification_id='kycv-uuid-0002' returns 'resolved'

test_name: BM resolves with waiver + evidenceRef
preconditions: BM user JWT with branch scope
test_steps: Body: { "resolutionCode": "waiver", "remarks": "Address mismatch waived — see compliance approval", "evidenceRef": "COMP-APPROVAL-2026-0047" }

test_data.remarks: Address mismatch waived — see compliance approval

expected_result: HTTP 200; data.resolutionCode='waiver'; data.status='resolved'; audit intent queued with action='kyc_exception'; evidenceRef stored
postconditions: SELECT resolution_code FROM kyc_verifications WHERE kyc_verification_id='kycv-uuid-0003' returns 'waiver'

test_name: RM cannot resolve KYC exception — FORBIDDEN
expected_result: HTTP 403; error.code='FORBIDDEN'; kyc_verifications.status unchanged in DB

test_name: provider_down_manual without compliance flag — FORBIDDEN
expected_result: HTTP 403; error.code='FORBIDDEN'; kyc_verifications.status unchanged; exception not resolved

test_name: CONFLICT — exception already resolved, second resolution attempt rejected
preconditions: kyc_verifications row: id='kycv-uuid-resolved', status='resolved' (already resolved by another user)
expected_result: HTTP 409; error.code='CONFLICT'; kyc_verifications.status remains 'resolved'; no duplicate audit or outbox entry

test_name: waiver missing evidenceRef — VALIDATION_ERROR
expected_result: HTTP 400; error.code='VALIDATION_ERROR'; error.fields[0].field='evidenceRef'; no status change in DB

test_name: kyc_status remains exception when other open exceptions still exist
preconditions: Lead has 2 kyc_verifications rows both in status='exception': kycv-uuid-A and kycv-uuid-B
expected_result: HTTP 200; data.status='resolved' for kycv-uuid-A; leads.kyc_status STILL 'exception' (kycv-uuid-B still open); leads.kyc_status only changes to 'verified' after kycv-uuid-B is also resolved
postconditions: SELECT kyc_status FROM leads WHERE lead_id='55555555-5555-5555-5555-555555555555' returns 'exception' (after first resolve only)

test_name: Transaction rollback — outbox INSERT failure rolls back resolution
preconditions: OutboxService.emit mock throws Error('DB write fail') after kyc_verifications UPDATE
expected_result: HTTP 500; error.code='INTERNAL_ERROR'; no stack trace in response body; kyc_verifications.status remains 'exception' (transaction rolled back); no event_outbox row for this resolution; no audit_logs row for this resolution
postconditions: SELECT status FROM kyc_verifications WHERE kyc_verification_id='kycv-uuid-0002' returns 'exception'

test_name: KYC_EXCEPTION_OPEN blocks hand-off — open exception prevents stage transition
preconditions: Lead with kyc_status='exception' (open kyc_verifications row with status='exception')
expected_result: HTTP 409; error.code='CONFLICT'; error detail contains 'KYC_EXCEPTION_OPEN'; leads.stage unchanged; no handoff action performed
postconditions: leads.stage not changed to 'handed_off'

test_name: E2E — KYC Workbench exception resolution full flow
preconditions: Lead with open KYC exception in exception queue
expected_result: Modal closes after successful resolution; exception row disappears from exception queue; Toast shows 'KYC exception resolved'; lead status chip updates from 'Exception' to 'Verified' (if last exception)

ui_meta.visual_assert: Modal closes; Toast 'KYC exception resolved' visible; exception no longer in queue
ui_meta.a11y: modal has role=dialog; focus trapped in modal; close button accessible; combobox and textarea labeled

test_name: Data Integrity — No resolved KYC exception without resolution_code or audit entry
test_steps: Execute two invariant queries after resolution tests

test_data.invariant_sql_1: SELECT kyc_verification_id FROM kyc_verifications WHERE status IN ('resolved', 'waived') AND resolution_code IS NULL
test_data.invariant_sql_2: SELECT kv.kyc_verification_id FROM kyc_verifications kv WHERE kv.status = 'resolved' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM audit_logs al WHERE al.entity_type = 'kyc_verifications' AND al.entity_id = kv.kyc_verification_id AND al.action = 'kyc_exception')

expected_result: Both queries return 0 rows

di_meta.setup_sql: -- Run after TC-FR072-01 resolves an exception
di_meta.action: Query for resolved exceptions missing resolution_code or audit entry
di_meta.invariant_query: SELECT kyc_verification_id FROM kyc_verifications WHERE status IN ('resolved', 'waived') AND resolution_code IS NULL
di_meta.cleanup: DELETE FROM kyc_verifications WHERE kyc_verification_id IN ('kycv-uuid-0002', 'kycv-uuid-0003')
